headline: Seagate and Western Digital: AI Storage Demand Is Now Showing Up in Pricing Power
summary: Introduction Artificial Intelligence (“AI”) and generative AI such as ChatGPT necessitate the need for substantial memory and storage capabilities for the storage of extensive datasets, training intricate models, and handling vast volumes of data processing. Nvidia (NVDA) is the poster child of AI and generative AI through its GPU (graphical processing units) chips. GPUs are ... headline: Is Strong Q3 AI Storage Demand And A Higher Dividend Altering The Investment Case For Western Digital (WDC)?
summary: In recent weeks, Western Digital reported a strong fiscal third-quarter with earnings surpassing analyst expectations, supported by robust AI-driven demand for high-capacity storage and an announced 20% increase in its quarterly dividend. These results highlight how the company’s mix of advanced HDD technologies and expanding role in AI infrastructure is reshaping its earnings profile and capital return priorities. We’ll now examine how Western Digital’s stronger earnings and higher dividend...
